title: BRAIN CONNECTS: LINC — Larva-to-adult INtegrated Connectomics
abstract: The LINC project under the BRAIN CONNECTS program aims to map a human brain at unprecedented resolution using a combination of diffusion MRI, polarization-sensitive optical coherence tomography, and serial sectioning to create a mesoscale connectome bridging macro- and micro-scale anatomy.
notes: This is a funded project, not a traditional paper. Author list and details are approximate. The LINC project is a major BRAIN Initiative effort led by Yendiki to produce a mesoscale human connectome.
